title: sarcochilus borealis
intro: Sarcochilus borealis, also known as the Northern Greenhood Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sarcochilus borealis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Sarcochilus borealis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
